# seo-geo-report-engine

> Open-source SEO and AI-search (GEO) report engine. Point it at any website and it scans the
> company plus its competitors with live data, then renders an 18-section competitive report as a
> branded PDF. AI visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity and Google AI Overviews,
> backlink and keyword gaps, traffic share, greenfield keyword map, reputation, ads footprint,
> social reach and Core Web Vitals. MIT licensed, stdlib-only Python, runs inside Claude Code or
> any agent harness.

Quickstart with zero API keys. Clone the repo and run
`python3 tools/report/first_scan.py --project demo --date "sample data" --render`
to render the full demo report from fictional data. A real scan needs a pay-as-you-go DataForSEO
account and costs about one to two dollars per company plus eight competitors.

For agents. Read CLAUDE.md in the repo root for routing. Skills register automatically in Claude
Code. Every tool is plain stdlib Python callable with flags. Client projects live in
projects/<slug>/ as pure data and are gitignored, only the fictional demos ship.

## Docs

- [Homepage](https://geoseo-visibility.prashish.xyz/) how it works, sample reports, screenshots
- [Capabilities](https://geoseo-visibility.prashish.xyz/capabilities.html) all 18 report sections, 33 skills, 8 workflows, 5 subagents, 9 playbooks
- [Repository](https://github.com/prashishh/seo-geo-report-engine) source, README, operating manual

## Samples

- [Sample report 1](https://geoseo-visibility.prashish.xyz/assets/sample-report-1.pdf) consumer brand demo, 18 sections
- [Sample report 2](https://geoseo-visibility.prashish.xyz/assets/sample-report-2.pdf) B2B SaaS demo, 17 sections
